title: Section 47
content: No person shall cross any river or stream on a buoy or inflated skin, nor shall have in his possession or custody any buoy or skin for the purpose of being used in crossing any river or stream, except 1* * * subject to rules to be from time to time, either generally or in any particular instance, prescribed by the State Government.
footnote: 1. The words “with the consent and” omitted by Act 12 of 1878, s. 6.
